etymology.description: 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog") + 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") + ⺼(⺼) (ròu, "meat") -> dog eating meat to satisfaction -> modern form: 犬 + 甘 (corrupted 口) + 日 (subsequent change)
etymology.interpretation: The character 猒 originally depicted a dog enjoying a meal, symbolizing satisfaction. Over time, the components evolved, particularly with 口 changing to 甘, and further to 日 in the modern character.
